prompt.customInstructions: dummyjson.com provides a stable public JSON test API. Use GET /products/search?q=<query> — returns { products: [...] }. No HTML parsing needed despite mode:http.
prompt.knownIssues: dummyjson.com is a test-only API. Real supplier adapters should never import from this domain.
prompt.apiNotes: Endpoints: GET /products, GET /products/:id, GET /products/search?q=<term>. All public, no auth. Response schema: { products: [{ id, title, description, price, brand, category, ... }], total, skip, limit }.
